prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms). Method: DFT, tier 'standard' → B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting, in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied aniline.xyz, used as-is (single point). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed.

Key results:
- HOMO (index 24): −5.553772 eV
- LUMO (index 25): −0.2489544 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap)
- Vertical IP (Koopmans): 5.553772 eV
- Vertical EA (Koopmans): 0.2489544 eV
- Total energy: −287.71578 Hartree

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard aniline.xyz
